CloudTest Dynamics

Director, QA Engineering

LOCATION

San Francisco, CA (Hybrid - 3
days/week onsite)

TYPE

Full-time

COMPENSATION

$320,000 - $420,000 USD

TECH STACK

Playwright

Selenium

Cypress

Postman

Python

JavaScript/Node.js

GitHub Actions / CI test
pipelines

Jenkins

Docker

AWS/GCP

About CloudTest Dynamics: CloudTest Dynamics is a rapidly
growing QA and testing automation platform provider serving
Fortune 500 enterprises. We build comprehensive testing
infrastructure and quality assurance solutions that help teams
deliver reliable cloud-native applications at scale. Founded in

2018, our platform enables thousands of developers and QA
engineers across multiple industries to automate testing,
ensure compliance, and maintain the highest standards of
software quality.

We are seeking an experienced Director of QA Engineering to

lead our growing Quality Assurance organization. In this
strategic leadership role, you will oversee multiple QA teams,
establish quality standards and testing strategies, drive
continuous improvement initiatives, and partner with
engineering leadership to ensure enterprise-grade reliability
across our platform. You'll manage people leaders, mentor
senior QA engineers, and directly influence our product
roadmap and quality culture. This is a hands-on director role
where you'll balance strategic oversight with deep technical
expertise in test automation, CI/CD integration, and modern
testing frameworks.

RESPONSIBILITIES

Lead and manage a team of 15-20 QA professionals
including QA managers, senior engineers, and automation
specialists, driving performance, growth, and career
development

Define and implement comprehensive QA strategies aligned
with company objectives, including test coverage targets,
automation roadmaps, and quality metrics dashboards

Architect and oversee enterprise-scale test automation
frameworks using Playwright, Selenium, and Cypress for
cross-browser and API testing across cloud infrastructure

Establish CI/CD test pipeline standards and best practices,
ensuring integration with GitHub Actions, Jenkins, and
related platforms for continuous quality validation

Partner with VP of Engineering and Product leadership to
incorporate quality requirements into sprint planning,

release cycles, and feature prioritization

Drive adoption of Python and JavaScript automation scripts
across teams, establishing coding standards and code
review processes for test automation

Intelligent Quality Assurance forEnterprise Cloud Solutions Champion advanced testing practices including
performance testing with Postman, security testing, and
load testing strategies for cloud-based applications

Mentor QA managers and senior automation engineers in
technical leadership, people management, and strategic
thinking; build a high-performing quality culture

Oversee budget allocation, hiring, vendor management, and
tool selection for QA infrastructure; drive ROI on testing

tools and platforms

REQUIREMENTS

10+ years of QA and testing experience with at least 5+
years in leadership/management roles overseeing QA
teams and managers

Deep hands-on expertise with modern test automation

frameworks: Playwright, Selenium, Cypress, or equivalent;
proficiency in JavaScript and/or Python for test script
development

Proven experience designing and scaling CI/CD test
pipelines, integrating automated testing with deployment
workflows in cloud environments (AWS/GCP/Azure)

Strong experience with API testing tools like Postman and
understanding of REST/GraphQL testing methodologies for
microservices architectures

Demonstrated success building and mentoring high-
performing QA teams, managing multiple managers, and
establishing quality culture at scale

Strategic mindset with ability to develop multi-year QA
roadmaps, drive metrics-driven quality initiatives, and
influence product development processes

BONUS POINTS

Experience with advanced testing frameworks such as
TestNG, pytest, or similar in enterprise environments

Familiarity with performance testing tools (JMeter,
LoadRunner, or cloud-based alternatives) and security
testing practices

Background in Agile/Scrum environments and experience
implementing quality gates in DevOps workflows

Knowledge of containerized testing environments (Docker,
Kubernetes) and test infrastructure automation

BENEFITS

Highly competitive salary and equity package with annual
bonus structure (15-20% target)

 Comprehensive health benefits including medical, dental,
and vision with 90% employer premium coverage

Unlimited PTO policy plus 10 company holidays

Professional development budget of $5,000 annually for
certifications, conferences, and training

$500/month remote work stipend for home office setup and
internet

Parental leave (16 weeks paid for primary caregivers, 8

weeks for secondary) and fertility benefits

401(k) plan with 4% company match, financial planning
services, and wellness programs

APPLY

Apply directly via our careers portal at
careers.cloudtestdynamics.com or send your resume and
cover letter to hiring@cloudtestdynamics.com. Please include
examples of QA strategies you've implemented at scale and

your approach to building high-performing teams. We review
applications on a rolling basis and move quickly for qualified
candidates.
